findings.title: Referenced capability scopes make T1 and T2 unexecutable
findings.detail: Architect must run property tests and Linux process/launch spikes but lacks Bash. Security must author documents, manifests, and deterministic fixtures but lacks Write, Edit, and Bash.

findings.title: The strict DAG places Go module initialization downstream of CI that requires it
findings.detail: T3 must complete toolchain and module-integrity CI before T4 starts, while B1 inside T4 owns initialization of the module/toolchain and dependency manifest.

blocking_findings.title: Referenced capability scopes make T1 and T2 unexecutable
blocking_findings.detail: Architect lacks Bash; security lacks Write, Edit, and Bash for their required lane outputs.

blocking_findings.title: The strict DAG places Go module initialization downstream of CI that requires it
blocking_findings.detail: T3 depends on bootstrap currently assigned to downstream T4 B1.
